titleStmt.title: SII 5.765: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 765. (A.R. No. 201 of 1895). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SHRINE IN THE KULASEKHARAMUDAIYAR TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakābdam 10 489 lmeṟ cellāniṉṟa svasti śrī bhuvanaika vira caṅrakulapradipa madhurāmaheṅra jayan=tamaṅgaḷapuravarādhīśvara kṣemāsuranārasiṁha keraḷatamodivākara coḷasindhuvaṭavānala sāhityasārvabhauma devabrāhmaṇasthāpanācāryya kojaṭilavarmmarā ṉa tribhuvanaccakravatti konermaikoṇṭāṉa śrīperumāḷ Aḻakaṉperumāḷ Ativirarāmaṉaāya śrīvallabhade vaṟku yāṇṭu 5 vatu prabhavasaṁ vatsara ttu Uttarāyaṉattu heman=taṛ tuvil makararavi 3[ *] yum
pūrvvapakṣa ttu Ekāuśi yum somavāra mum śubhayoga śubhakara ṇamum peṟṟa rohiṇinakṣatra ttu nāḷ punarvasunakṣatra ttu jātarā ṉa śrīperumāḷ Aḻakaṉperumāḷ Ativīrarāmaṉāya śrīval labhadevar Āṉa nām Uṭaiyār kulaśekara nātha ṉukkum kuḻalvāymoḻimaṅkainācciyāṟkum karṣaṇādi pratiṣṭhān=tam Upānādi stūpiparyan=tam tiruppaṇiyum ceyvittu kulaśekaranātha ṉaiyum kuḻalvāymoḻimaṅkainācciyāraiyum parivārade vataiyaḷaiyum pratiṣṭhi ttu nittiya naimittiyaṅkaḷum Ut
savapariyan=tam Āka naṭantuvarumpaṭikku Itukaḷukku veṇṭum celavukkum viṭṭa nam vācaṟkaṇakkar Iṭṭa kaittaṭippaṭi kuṟumaṟaināṭṭu kuṟuṅakāṉamāṉa Irācacūriyanallūṟkum toppukkum Ellaiāvatu teṉellai ciṟṟāṟṟukku vaṭakku vaṭaellai veḷḷāḻaṉkuḷattuk karaikkāṭṭu Ellaikku teṟku melellai vaḻitiyūrpaṟṟukkum kuḷattukkum cuntiraparaṇṭiyapurattu Ellaikkum kiḻakku kiḻellai kalaṅkal Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟu Āṉaikuḷattil Ellaikkum kumāraneripperuvaḻikkum taṭṭappāṟaippoṉ
lukkum kuṉiccāṉpāṭi Ellaikkum Aṟiñcāpirāṭṭivatikkum meṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaikku Uḷpaṭṭa periyakuḷam Akavayal puṉakkuḷam Itila muṉ Uṇṭākiya de vatāyam brahmadā yam maṭappuṟam Ayyaṉpātti Ammaiviḷākam teṟkil Iṭaitavaṇaiyum nīṅkalāka Uṇṭākiya Akavayal puṉakkuḷam nañcai puñcai nattam ceyttalait tiṭar vāpi kūpam māvaṭai maravaṭai melum Uṇṭākiya Ākkapperukkam toppu Ūttaippāṭṭam
pācivilai cekkiṟai taṟikkaṭamai koṭikkaṭamai Ulāvukāṭcai teṉpaṭu poṟṟai mīṉpaṭu paḷḷam maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭa sakalasamastaprāpti kaḷukkum nām koḷḷum komuṟaiyāka Uḷḷa Eṟpeṟpaṭṭatum nam variyuḷār kaṇakkilum tavirttu Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku tevatāṉam Āka Ācaṅrārkam Ivvālaiyam Uḷḷaaḷavāka cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭi kaiyāṇṭukoḷḷavum pāṟka Ivai koṭumaḷūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.765 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
